subject_options: Core Health and Performance — one conversion gap worth addressing
Your 53 five-star reviews deserve a booking system to match
Something small holding back Core Health enquiries
email_body:
I came across Core Health and Performance while looking at fitness and wellness businesses in Westport and wanted to reach out directly.

Your Google profile is genuinely strong — a 5-star rating across 53 reviews is not something most local businesses can say. What stood out to me is that the site does not currently have a way for someone to book directly, meaning a prospective client who is ready to commit still has to send a form or pick up the phone. For a business with that level of social proof, that is worth addressing.

I work with health and wellness businesses on focused conversion improvements — in this case, integrating a booking flow and surfacing your review rating more prominently on the site, without changing what is already working.

Would you be open to a short walkthrough call where I can show you exactly how these changes would look on your current site?

Best regards
[Your name]
cta: Would you be open to a short walkthrough call where I can show you exactly how these changes would look on your current site?
follow_up_body: I wanted to follow up on the email I sent last week about Core Health and Performance. The short version is that adding an online booking flow to your existing site could close the gap between people finding you through your reviews and actually getting in touch. I work with businesses on exactly this kind of focused improvement. Would this be something worth a conversation in the coming weeks, or is there someone else on your end who handles the website?
personalisation_tokens_used: No online booking system present on the site
